items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 I really love this game! I love how it d
items.summary: I really love this game! I love how it doesn't force you to grind and isn't very time capped like other games. you can play at your own pace and get any character you want! the story is also really interesting! but I wish every chapter was voiced like the prologue.... it's still very nice though!

items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 El juego en si me encanta, mas que esta
items.summary: El juego en si me encanta, mas que esta en español, y los personajes me encantan en si, si es que se puede en un futuro, quiciera que se pueda tener interacciones con los personajes, como citas, hablar mas de ellos, o interacciones romanticas y para mi ya estaria perfecto, obviamente asi como esta tambien me encanta.

items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 I only downloaded it because of the coll
items.summary: I only downloaded it because of the collaboration with Saya hehe, I can't wait to play it jeje, Edit: I don't understand the game, but I loved it. I loved the game itself—the story, the graphics, and the gameplay. It's very entertaining and easy to get hooked on, even if I don't understand it. I just love it. And I was able to win Saya over, the reason I downloaded the game, it's simply beautiful, if I could I would give it a higher rating
items.author: ウリエルUriel
